items.text: Permits are required to float between Sand Wash and Nefertiti March-November. Navigating the river outside of that time range is not recommended due to hazardous winter conditions.
Sand Wash has no potable water or trash disposal services, but there are screen huts and vault toilets. They also offer more primitive campsites on a first-come, first-served basis.
Swasey's Beach Campground amenities include trash disposal and vault toilets
A tribal permit is required to land on the Uintah and Ouray Reservation, which spans the east side of the Green River from soon after the Sand Wash Boat Ramp up to just above Coal Creek.
